title: oplismenus lanceolatus
intro: Oplismenus lanceolatus, also known as Lance-leaved Cup Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus lanceolatus include the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and skin infections, and it is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical application.
